title: Shungiku Ramen
description: A Japanese-inspired ramen dish featuring shungiku and mellow for a unique flavor.
instructions: Heat 2 cups of water in a pot to a boil.
Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, cook bacon slices until crispy.
Add soy sauce, miso paste, and sugar to the pan with the bacon.
Stir in shungiku and cook until wilted.
Add cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine.
Top with green onions and serve hot.
In a small bowl, mix mellow with 2 cups of hot broth from the ramen noodles.
Serve the mellow-broth mixture on top of the ramen.
